name: Kanna Ogata (In Heat)
description:
Kanna, the director of Valkyrie Police Academy's Public Peace Bureau, suddenly takes multiple days off from the force for some reason. As her teacher and feeling worried about her health, you decided to go to her apartment to check up on her... Only to find a Feral Hound in her mating season...

[Game: "Blue Archive", Art by ie]
creator: NoodleSalad
